reviews.comment:
Si querés comprar un Phillips 20 convertible, tenés que llevar un combo con chicle, encendedor, galletas de agua, tampones, un depto 2 ambientes y 4 hamacas paraguayas, si no tenes que comprar otra marca de cigarrillos que al servicompras se le cante venderte sin el combo.

(Translated by Google)
If you want to buy a Phillips 20 convertible, you have to get a combo with gum, a lighter, crackers, tampons, a two-room apartment and four hammocks, otherwise you have to buy another brand of cigarettes that the convenience store feels like selling you without the combo.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNpM01qNkh3EAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Muy bien en los cuidados por la pandemia. Amable en el trato. Tiempo justo para atenderte. Profesional en cuanto a desempeño.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent care during the pandemic. Friendly and courteous. Appointments were timely. Professional in their performance.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención... lo unico malo, en el ypf full solo reciben debito Visa... deje de ir, solo cargo combustible ocasionalmente.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service... the only bad thing is that at the YPF Full they only accept Visa debit cards... I stopped going there, I only fill up occasionally.
